resultList.dtldesc: Elegant Architectural Living in the Cultural Heart of Chennai::::::::Discover the perfect blend of traditional charm and modern luxury in this stunning builder floor apartment, located in the highly prestigious neighbourhood of Mylapore. This contemporary residence offers a sophisticated lifestyle for those who appreciate the heritage of old Chennai while desiring the comforts of a new construction. Facing south and designed to capture refreshing breezes, the home is part of an exclusive low-density project that ensures maximum privacy and tranquility. Positioned in one of the city's most vibrant residential and spiritual hubs, this property represents a rare opportunity for discerning buyers seeking an elite address.::::::::Property Specifications::::::::The residence boasts a well-planned super area of 1,570 sq. ft, featuring a highly efficient layout that prioritises space and natural light. It comprises three spacious bedrooms and three modern bathrooms, each fitted with high-quality western fixtures and designed for contemporary comfort. The interior features an expansive living room that flows into a dedicated dining area, creating an ideal environment for family gatherings. A private balcony offers a peaceful view of the tree-lined neighbourhood streets. The home is semi-furnished, featuring a sleek modular kitchen that is both functional and stylish. Premium vitrified flooring is used throughout the apartment, providing a polished and durable finish that complements the modern aesthetic.::::::::Facilities::::::::The property is supported by a range of essential facilities to ensure a comfortable and secure living experience. It provides one dedicated covered parking space for a vehicle and benefits from a continuous 24-hour water supply. A 100% power backup system is in place to ensure uninterrupted convenience for all residents. The building is serviced by a modern lift for easy access to the floor. Security is a paramount feature, with a professional team and a comprehensive CCTV surveillance system monitoring the premises around the clock, providing peace of mind in this serene residential enclave.::::::::Locality::::::::The apartment is nestled in the heart of Mylapore, a neighbourhood celebrated for its rich history, iconic temples, and exceptional connectivity. The property is conveniently located near the Citi Centre Mall and the prestigious Luz Corner, placing it within easy reach of top-tier schools and multi-speciality hospitals. For leisure and shopping, the area offers a unique mix of traditional markets and modern retail outlets. The locality is well-served by public transport, with the Mundagakanni Amman Koil MRTS station nearby, ensuring seamless travel across Chennai. Banks, ATMs, and a diverse range of fine-dining and traditional restaurants are all within walking distance, making this one of the most convenient and sought-after locations in the city.

Healthcare facilities such as Elmer Medical Center and New Life Hospital further enhance day-to-day convenience for residents.

The locality continues to witness steady residential growth, making it a promising choice for both end-users and investors seeking spacious housing options outside the city’s core areas.
